narrative:
Concord Twp township has 9,702 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.1 percentage points.
